LanguageData.NCL_Charge.label: Charge
LanguageData.NCL_Mech_Mantis.label: Mantis
LanguageData.NCL_Mech_Mantis.description: Unit File: NCL-06 "Mantis" Origin: NCL Autonomous Mechanoid Series VI This sixth-generation tactical unit, fusing a humanoid-female torso with a wolf-spider chassis, specializes in close-quarters assassination and shock infiltration. Its heavy combat armor integrates dynamic self-repair systems to regenerate defensive layers during isolated engagements, yet energy-redistribution protocols render it critically vulnerable under concentrated fire. Hydraulic actuators enable short-range phase-leaps for instant gap closure or tactical withdrawal. The signature Binary Veil System deploys smokescreen barriers while launching two infrared-guided Gyro-Blades—detonating on impact with EMP bursts and directional shrapnel to cripple electronics and eviscerate organic targets. Terminal protocol "Heartfire" triggers core meltdown, igniting the unit in a catastrophic blast to annihilate high-threat hostiles.
LanguageData.NCL_Mech_Mantis.tools.left_blade.label: left blade
LanguageData.NCL_Mech_Mantis.tools.right_blade.label: right blade
LanguageData.NCL_Mech_Mantis.tools.head.label: head
